# CWE-368 vulnerable — Context Switching Race Condition
lang: go
file: CWE-368-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/user"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

var actingAsRoot bool

func RunMaintenanceShell(c *GinCtx) error {
	if c.Request.Header.Get("X-Maintainer") == "yes" {
		actingAsRoot = true
	}
	if actingAsRoot {
		return os.Setenv("SHELL", "/bin/sh")
	}
	_, _ = user.Current()
	return nil
}
